project_summary: AQI Predictor is a full-stack machine learning web application that predicts Air Quality Index from 8 environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, wind_speed, co2, pm25, pm10, no2, so2). It trains 3 models (Linear Regression, Random Forest, Decision Tree), auto-selects the best by R² score, and exposes predictions via a FastAPI REST API consumed by a React+Vite frontend with a dark cyberpunk UI. Features include a real-time predictor form with an SVG gauge, 7-day forecast with Recharts visualizations, analytics dashboard, an admin panel for on-demand retraining, and a rich Settings page with 8 sub-sections. The project is designed for deployment with Vercel (frontend) and Render (backend).

tech_stack.frontend: React 18.3.1, React Router DOM 6.23.1, Vite 5.2.11, TailwindCSS 3.4.3, Recharts 2.12.5, Framer Motion 11.2.6, Lucide React 0.383.0, Axios 1.7.2, clsx 2.1.1. Fonts: Syne (display), DM Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (mono).
tech_stack.backend: Python 3.10+, FastAPI 0.111.0, Uvicorn 0.29.0, Pydantic 2.7.1, scikit-learn 1.4.2, pandas 2.2.2, numpy 1.26.4, python-multipart 0.0.9, httpx 0.27.0. Single-file app (app.py) with ML training module (train.py).
tech_stack.database: None. No database is used. Model artifacts (best_model.pkl, scaler.pkl, metrics.pkl) are persisted to disk via pickle. Historical and forecast data are generated randomly at runtime — they are NOT stored.
tech_stack.other_tools: Render (backend deployment via render.yaml), Vercel (frontend deployment via vercel.json), PostCSS + Autoprefixer for CSS processing.

architecture: Client-server architecture. Frontend (port 3000) communicates with backend (port 8000) via REST API. In development, Vite proxies '/api' requests to 'http://localhost:8000' with path rewriting. In production, Vercel rewrites '/api/:path*' to the Render backend URL. Data flow: User → React UI → Axios → FastAPI → loads pickled model + scaler → StandardScaler.transform → model.predict() → classify AQI into 6 EPA categories → return JSON. Training pipeline: load_dataset → clean_dataset → train_test_split (80/20) → StandardScaler → train 3 models → evaluate R²/MAE/RMSE → save best. React routing: BrowserRouter with 6 routes (/, /predictor, /forecast, /analytics, /admin, /settings). No global state management — each page uses local useState/useEffect. Component hierarchy: App → Navbar + Routes → [Home, Predictor, Forecast, Analytics, Admin, Settings]. API calls centralized in utils/api.js via Axios instance with response interceptor.

features.name: ML-Powered AQI Prediction
features.description: POST /predict accepts 8 params, scales with StandardScaler, predicts via best model, returns AQI value, EPA category, color, health message, model name, confidence.

features.name: Interactive Predictor Form
features.description: 8 ParamInput components (range+number), 3 presets (clean/moderate/polluted), animated SVG gauge, health advisory tips, stat cards.

features.name: 7-Day Forecast
features.description: GET /forecast with AreaChart, day-by-day cards, PM2.5 BarChart, summary cards. User selects 3/7/14 days.

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Historical AQI AreaChart, pollution trends LineChart, feature importance BarChart, model comparison, predicted vs actual ScatterChart, AQI distribution histogram.

features.name: Admin Panel / Model Retraining
features.description: System status, model metrics, retrain button (POST /train), training console log, feature importance bars. NO authentication.

features.name: Settings Page
features.description: 8 sections (General, Appearance, Notifications, Thresholds, Data/API, ML Model, Profile, About) with toggles, selects, sliders, color picker, API keys. Nothing persists.

features.name: SVG AQI Gauge
features.description: Semicircle gauge with multi-color gradient arc, animated needle, tick marks, scale labels (0-500), CSS transitions.

features.name: Dark Cyberpunk Theme
features.description: CSS custom properties for dark navy backgrounds, cyan accent, animated gradient orbs, noise texture overlay, glassmorphic cards, glow borders, custom scrollbar.

features.name: Responsive Navigation
features.description: Fixed navbar with blur backdrop, desktop nav links, mobile horizontal scroll nav, hardcoded API status indicator.

features.name: Health Advisory System
features.description: Maps AQI categories to 3 health tips each, displays backend health_message, includes activity recommendations.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Noise texture overlay z-index:999 may interfere with future modals/tooltips
ui_ux_issues.cause: body::before in index.css line 46 has z-index:999. pointer-events:none is set but z-index is too high.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Admin and Settings nav links share same Lucide Settings icon
ui_ux_issues.cause: Navbar.jsx imports Settings once, uses for both (lines 10-11).
ui_ux_issues.fix: Use Shield or Lock icon for Admin, keep Settings for Settings.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Settings page 'Saved' toast triggers on ANY click, not just actual changes
ui_ux_issues.cause: Settings.jsx line 368: root div has onClick={triggerSave}.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Remove onClick from root div; trigger save only from actual setting change handlers.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Forecast summary cards (3-col grid) not responsive on mobile
ui_ux_issues.cause: Forecast.jsx line 93: grid-cols-3 with no responsive breakpoint.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Change to 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8'.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Mobile nav causes double-height header pushing content down
ui_ux_issues.cause: Mobile nav div below main nav adds height not accounted for in page pt-24 padding.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Use hamburger menu or increase responsive top padding.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Forecast day cards overflow horizontally on narrow screens
ui_ux_issues.cause: Forecast.jsx line 165: min-w-[160px] on right section.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Stack vertically on mobile using flex-col sm:flex-row.

ui_ux_issues.issue: Settings sidebar doesn't collapse on mobile
ui_ux_issues.cause: Fixed aside w-52 with no responsive breakpoint.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Make sidebar horizontal on mobile or add collapsible drawer.

ui_ux_issues.issue: 'API Live' indicator always shows green regardless of actual connectivity
ui_ux_issues.cause: Navbar.jsx lines 60-63: hardcoded green dot, no /health polling.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Add useEffect polling /health to toggle indicator.

ui_ux_issues.issue: No skeleton/shimmer loading states for chart areas
ui_ux_issues.cause: Only spinning loaders present, no skeleton placeholders.
ui_ux_issues.fix: Add skeleton placeholders or shimmer animations.

bugs.bug: React Rules of Hooks violation — useState inside .map() in Settings.jsx
bugs.cause: AQIThresholds lines 202-211 and MLModel lines 277-288 call useState(def) inside .map() callbacks. This violates React Rules of Hooks and will cause crashes.
bugs.fix: Extract slider rows into separate components (SliderRow) that manage own state.

bugs.bug: Historical AQI data (GET /aqi-history) returns random data every request
bugs.cause: app.py lines 182-202: random.uniform() with no fixed seed, no persistence.
bugs.fix: Seed random deterministically or implement real data storage.

bugs.bug: Forecast endpoint uses random data, not ML predictions
bugs.cause: app.py lines 204-229: random.uniform() generates AQI; model.predict() is never called.
bugs.fix: Generate forecast by running model.predict() on varied input parameters.

bugs.cause: vercel.json line 3: never updated with real URL.

bugs.bug: Stray '{backend' directory with empty nested structure at project root
bugs.cause: Accidental shell command with unescaped braces created garbage directory.

bugs.bug: Orphaned Settings.html (675 lines) — dead code not used by React
bugs.cause: HTML prototype never deleted after conversion to Settings.jsx.

bugs.bug: POST /train has no authentication — public retraining vulnerability
bugs.cause: app.py line 166: no auth middleware or API key check.
bugs.fix: Add X-API-Key header authentication or rate limiting.

bugs.bug: Forecast useEffect has missing dependency warning
bugs.cause: Forecast.jsx line 46: load function recreated on every render.
bugs.fix: Wrap load in useCallback or inline fetch logic in useEffect.

bugs.bug: AQIGauge generates new random gradient ID on every render
bugs.cause: AQIGauge.jsx line 16: Math.random() called outside useMemo.
bugs.fix: Wrap in useMemo(() => ..., []) for stable ID.

bugs.bug: Frontend co2 slider max (2000) mismatches backend validation max (5000)
bugs.cause: aqi.js line 33 max:2000 vs app.py line 57 le=5000.
bugs.fix: Align max values between frontend and backend.

performance_issues.issue: Noise texture SVG filter as full-viewport pseudo-element
performance_issues.fix: Convert to tiled PNG/WebP or remove.

performance_issues.issue: Analytics refetches metrics on every days change (metrics are day-independent)
performance_issues.fix: Fetch metrics once on mount, only refetch history on days change.

performance_issues.issue: No code splitting — all 6 pages bundled together
performance_issues.fix: Use React.lazy() + Suspense for route-level code splitting.

performance_issues.issue: Google Fonts loaded synchronously blocking render
performance_issues.fix: Font display swap already present; consider @font-face with local fallbacks.

performance_issues.issue: Recharts (~250KB) loaded globally but used on only 2 pages
Backend loads model synchronously on startup blocking event loop
performance_issues.fix: Use asyncio.to_thread() for async model loading.

code_quality.issue: Extensive inline styles instead of Tailwind classes
code_quality.improvement: Extract repeated inline styles into Tailwind utility classes.

code_quality.issue: Global mutable dict (_model_cache) with no thread safety
code_quality.improvement: Use asyncio.Lock or FastAPI Depends() for model access.

code_quality.issue: No TypeScript — plain JS/JSX with no type checking
code_quality.improvement: Migrate to TypeScript or add JSDoc type annotations.

code_quality.issue: Settings.jsx is 405 lines with 8 inline sub-components
code_quality.improvement: Extract each section into separate files under settings/ directory.

code_quality.issue: No React error boundary in component tree
code_quality.improvement: Add ErrorBoundary wrapping Routes for crash fallback UI.

code_quality.issue: No frontend tests (no test files or runner configured)

code_quality.improvement: Add pytest + httpx.AsyncClient for API testing.

code_quality.issue: AQI classification duplicated between backend and frontend
code_quality.improvement: Make backend single source of truth; remove redundant frontend classification.

code_quality.issue: No package-lock.json integrity verification in CI
code_quality.improvement: Use 'npm ci' instead of 'npm install' in CI.

issues: vercel.json API rewrite points to placeholder URL
No .env file exists — VITE_API_URL undefined, falls back to '/api'
No auth on POST /train — public retraining vulnerability
Pickle files may not survive Render ephemeral filesystem
app.py logging uses relative path for logs/app.log
No health check interval in render.yaml
render.yaml build creates logs/ but app.py also creates it at runtime
fixes: Update vercel.json with actual Render backend URL
Use absolute paths for log files
Use persistent volume or cloud storage for model artifacts
Restrict CORS to specific frontend domain
Add python-dotenv or Pydantic Settings for env vars

high: FIX React Rules of Hooks violation in Settings.jsx — useState inside .map() will crash (lines 202-211, 277-288)
FIX vercel.json placeholder backend URL — production deployment broken
FIX forecast and aqi-history to use deterministic or ML-predicted data instead of random
medium: FIX Settings page false 'Saved' toast on any click
FIX Navbar 'API Live' indicator to dynamically check health
FIX Admin/Settings using same Lucide icon
ADD .env files for both frontend and backend
ADD lazy loading / code splitting for Forecast and Analytics
FIX AQIGauge random gradient ID on every render
FIX forecast summary cards mobile responsiveness
low: DELETE orphaned Settings.html (675 lines dead code)
REDUCE inline styles to Tailwind classes
FIX noise texture z-index from 999 to lower value
ADD structured logging with rotation in backend
ALIGN frontend co2 slider max (2000) with backend (5000)

next_steps_for_ai: 1. CRITICAL: Fix Settings.jsx Rules of Hooks — extract useState inside .map() (AQIThresholds lines 202-211, MLModel lines 277-288) into separate SliderRow components.
2. Delete stray '{backend' directory at aqi-predictor/{backend/.
3. Delete orphaned Settings.html at frontend/src/pages/Settings.html.
4. Fix vercel.json: replace placeholder URL with actual backend deployment URL.
5. Create frontend/.env with VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000.
6. Fix app.py /forecast to use model.predict() on synthetic future parameters instead of random data.
7. Fix app.py /aqi-history to use deterministic seed (e.g., date-based) for consistent demo data.
8. Add X-API-Key authentication to POST /train endpoint.
9. Fix Navbar.jsx: use different icon for Admin vs Settings; add dynamic /health polling.
10. Fix Settings.jsx: remove onClick={triggerSave} from root div.
11. Fix AQIGauge.jsx: wrap gradient ID in useMemo for stable ID.
12. Replace @app.on_event('startup') with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
13. Add React.lazy() + Suspense for route-level code splitting in App.jsx.
14. Add responsive breakpoints for Forecast cards and Settings sidebar.
15. Restrict CORS to specific frontend domain in production.
16. Add ErrorBoundary wrapping Routes in App.jsx.
17. Add .gitignore: __pycache__/, *.pkl, .env, node_modules/, dist/, logs/.
18. Add Dockerfile for backend.
19. Separate Analytics metrics fetch from history fetch.
20. Implement localStorage persistence for Settings page user preferences.
